task_completion.description: Open the raw manuscript document in a word processor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) is open displaying the document with the title 'Atmospheric Escape and Evolution'.

task_completion.description: Format the title to 16pt, Bold, and Center aligned.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title 'Atmospheric Escape and Evolution...' appears bolded, centered on the page, and noticeably larger than the surrounding text. The formatting toolbar may show '16', 'Bold', and 'Center' when the title is selected.

task_completion.description: Format the abstract to 10pt, Italic, and Justified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The abstract text starting with 'We present a comprehensive model...' is italicized, has straight even margins on both left and right sides (justified), and appears slightly smaller than the body text.

task_completion.description: Format the main headings to 14pt, Bold, and Left aligned.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Headings such as '1. Introduction' and '2. Methodology' are bolded, aligned to the left margin, and larger than the body text.

task_completion.description: Set the main body paragraphs to Justified alignment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main body paragraphs (e.g., starting with 'The discovery of thousands') have straight, even margins on both the left and right sides, indicating justified alignment.

task_completion.description: Convert the comma-separated data into a table with specific columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A structured table grid is visible containing columns for 'Planet', 'Mass', 'Radius', and 'Equilibrium Temp'. Data entries like 'Kepler-11b' are placed inside individual table cells rather than being comma-separated text.
The 'Save As' dialog shows the filename 'typeset_manuscript.docx' being saved in the 'TextDocuments' folder, or the word processor's title bar displays 'typeset_manuscript.docx' after saving.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical word processor to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a GUI application like LibreOffice Writer, rather than terminal commands (e.g., pandoc, python scripts) being used to generate the output file.

integrity.description: The agent created a genuine table element rather than simulating one with spaces or tabs.
integrity.visual_evidence: The table has visible cell boundaries, gridlines, or table formatting handles in the GUI, confirming it is a native table object.

integrity.description: The agent manually applied the formatting using the application's tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent highlighting text and clicking formatting buttons (Bold, Italic, Alignment, Font Size) or using the 'Text to Table' dialog.
